title: vidaXL Wall-mounted Glass Mirror - 30x100 cm - Rectangle Design for Vanity and Makeup Use, Decorative Accessory for Bedroom or Bathroom
features: 【Space-saving Design】: Wall-mounted mirror with clips for easy installation, perfect for rooms with limited space
【Easy Assembly】: Comes with assembly manual for easy setup. (Screws and plugs for inside the wall not included.
【Clear Reflection】: Glass mirror face provides a clear and natural reflection. Excellent for makeup and personal grooming
【Versatile Use】: This rectangular mirror can be used to decorate your bedroom, hallway, living room, bathroom, or any other space
【Durable Material】: Made from strong and robust glass material. This mirror has a dimension of 30 x 100 cm and 4 mm thickness
description: Product Description Wall mounted: The make-up mirror is equipped with clips and can therefore be attached to the wall, making it very suitable for smaller rooms. Clear mirror image: The glass mirror provides a clear reflection. So you can enjoy a beautiful and natural reflection when you stand in front of the mirror. MULTIPURPOSE You can use the mirror to decorate your bedroom, wardrobe, hallway, living room, bathroom and any other place you want to add a luxurious touch.
